name: Configuratore Offerte
postStartCommand: sudo service postgresql start && sudo -u postgres psql -c "CREATE USER offerte WITH PASSWORD 'offerte_secret';" 2>/dev/null || true && sudo -u postgres psql -c "CREATE DATABASE offerte_db OWNER offerte;" 2>/dev/null || true && cd app && ([ -f .env ] || cp .env.example .env) && pnpm exec prisma migrate deploy 2>/dev/null || true && pnpm exec prisma db seed 2>/dev/null || true
